mapper.select: SELECT REJECT_REASON FROM ADOPTION WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '반려' ORDER BY APPLY_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ADOPTION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ADOPTION ( ADOPTION_ID, MEMBER_ID, ANIMAL_ID, VISIT_DATE, APPLY_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{adoptionId}, #{memberId}, #{animalId}, #{visitDate, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSDATE, '심사중' )

INSERT INTO ADOPTION_DETAIL ( ADOPTION_ID, JOB, HOUSING_TYPE, PET_EXPERIENCE, ADDRESS, ADOPTION_REASON ) VALUES ( #{adoptionId}, #{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{housingType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{petExperience, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{adoptionReason, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.select: SELECT AD.ADOPTION_ID, AD.MEMBER_ID, AD.ANIMAL_ID, AD.VISIT_DATE, AD.APPLY_DATE, AD.STATUS, AD.REJECT_REASON, A.ANIMAL_NAME, A.ANIMAL_TYPE, A.BREED, A.AGE, I.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS MAIN_IMAGE, DT.JOB, DT.HOUSING_TYPE, DT.PET_EXPERIENCE, DT.ADDRESS, DT.ADOPTION_REASON FROM ADOPTION AD JOIN ANIMAL A ON AD.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ADOPTION_DETAIL DT ON AD.ADOPTION_ID = DT.ADOPTION_ID WHERE AD.ADOPTION_ID = #{adoptionId}

SELECT AD.ADOPTION_ID, AD.ANIMAL_ID, AD.VISIT_DATE, AD.APPLY_DATE, AD.STATUS, A.ANIMAL_NAME, A.ANIMAL_TYPE, A.BREED, A.AGE, I.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS MAIN_IMAGE FROM ADOPTION AD JOIN ANIMAL A ON AD.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE AD.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY AD.APPLY_DATE DESC
